2361100.name: Getting To The Other Side!!!
2361100.description:
Why did the chicken cross the road?
Getting To The Other Side!!! finally gives you the answer — one brutal jump at a time.

Getting To The Other Side!!! is a fast-paced 3D platformer inspired by classic arcade challenge games, where precision movement, tight timing, and perseverance are the only way forward. Run, jump, dash, and wall-jump your way through a series of handcrafted levels designed to test your reflexes — and your resolve.

Each level is built to push players just a little further than they think they can go. Mistakes are punished, but every failure teaches you something new.

Features

  • 5 large, handcrafted levels packed with traps, hazards, and precision platforming challenges. With more levels coming in future updates.

  • Tight, responsive controls built for fast movement and skillful play

  • Colorful, stylized visuals that keep the action readable even at high speed

  • A playful, original soundtrack and sound effects that balance tension with humor
2361100.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
